description_long: This house consists of three modern, detached units arranged side by side, each with a flat or gently sloped roof and large, rectangular windows. The facades are primarily white with accents of gray and tan, and each unit features a driveway and a small patch of green lawn in front. The leftmost unit has a prominent garage door and a partially enclosed patio, while the central unit is more cubic with a rooftop terrace and a minimalist entryway. The rightmost unit stands out with a sloped terracotta roof section and a large, glass-walled balcony. All units have multiple stories, with clean lines and a focus on geometric forms. The overall design emphasizes openness, natural light, and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A set of three modern, multi-story houses with flat and sloped roofs, large windows, and minimalist facades, each featuring driveways and small lawns.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three houses with their main entrances, driveways, and large windows; the rightmost house has a sloped terracotta roof.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back facades, rooftop terraces, and the sloped roof of the rightmost house.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the depth of the houses, balconies, and the arrangement of windows and patios.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear patios, additional windows, and the overall blocky structure of the houses.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass balcony walls
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist entryways with flat doors, small porches, and direct access from driveways; no prominent decorative elements.
